reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of representation and evaluation, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links ontological bias, parser-dependent search spaces, anomalous residues, and threshold rhetoric into one critique.
falsifiable_why: Testable if decomposition standards and threshold parameters are fixed beforehand, then compared on anomalous inputs.
explanation: System success may reflect parser assumptions, not genuine coverage of reality, unless decomposition and thresholds are pre-specified.
